steps.note: la_soglia → lab_vestibule (Lab: three offerings to open Hall of Substances)
Third offering → lab_offers_complete; Hall of Substances opens
Decode the Tria Prima triangle → lab_symbols_deciphered
lab_salt_collected; all three branches now open
lab_substances → lab_bain_marie (enter so leaving sets the bain_marie_left flag)
lab_bain_marie → lab_substances; bain_marie_left is now set — outer water will transform after 3 external visits

steps.command: arrange leaves prudence friendship pleasure simplicity absence tranquillity memory
steps.note: Epicurean leaf puzzle → leaves_arranged; path north unlocks
Inscribe the missing maxim (psycho_weight must be 0) → stele_inscribed; grove opens
Place all items at the statue's feet → ataraxia granted, garden_complete, psycho_weight reset to 0
Mount the lenses in inverted order → lenses_combined; corridor north opens
Heisenberg puzzle: see without looking → heisenberg_walked; both branches open
Turning 7/7 → void_silence_complete; proustian flash, dial pointer appears
Read the trembling dial → void_fluctuation_measured; passage south opens
The constant beneath constants in natural units → archive_constant_entered; passage south opens
Set the only honest origin point → obs_calibrated; dome opens
Rotate the primary mirror inward → obs_mirror_inverted
Look into the inverted telescope — see yourself → the constant granted, obs_complete
Face north while moving south — mirror door appears → hall_backward_walked; corridor south opens
Press the tile that differs from its neighbours → corridor_tile_pressed; south end opens
Construct a pentagon with compass and straightedge → proportion_pentagon_drawn; both wings open

steps.command: write The light falls on this empty canvas and I place here what exists only now in this room in this hour in this particular quality of attention which is mine alone and cannot be reproduced or approximated or revised into anything more honest than what I offer at this specific moment without hesitation or the pretense of artistic distance from what is true
steps.note: Paint an imaginary work in at least 50 words → gallery_originals_complete; passage south opens
gallery_light → gallery_central (psycho_weight must be 0 for the clean break)
Shatter the mirror with empty hands → the proportion granted, gallery_complete
Light the furnace and begin calcination → furnace_calcinating
Turning 5/5 → furnace_calcinated; path south to Great Work opens
The gentlest alchemical degree → alembic_temperature_set; path south opens
lab_great_work → lab_bain_marie (special re-entry: outer water has transformed; bain_marie_complete ✓)
Great Work: place substance in saturn circle (1/7)
Moon circle (7/7) → lab_great_work_complete; sealed chamber door opens
lab_great_work → lab_sealed (gate: all four lab conditions ✓)
Breathe into the alembic — the living reagent → the catalyst granted, lab_complete
lab_vestibule → la_soglia (all four simulacra now in inventory)
la_soglia → quinto_landing (gate: all four simulacra in inventory ✓)
The first word you truly learned → memory_childhood paid

steps.command: write I said I would return but did not
steps.note: A promise not kept → memory_youth paid
Speak the unsaid thing into the telephone → memory_maturity paid
What you wish to be remembered as → memory_old_age paid
quinto_landing → quinto_ritual_chamber (gate: all four memory prices paid ✓)
Place the Garden simulacrum in the cup (1/4)
Lab simulacrum (4/4); all four placed → stir prompt
Drink the infusion → ritual_complete; auto-navigates to il_nucleo (The Antagonist)
Set down the notebook and all mundane items → psycho_weight resets to 0; simulacra are kept
Resolution keyword with psycho_weight == 0 → The Antagonist concedes → finale_acceptance (Ending 1: Acceptance)
Epilogue command — the Archive empties, time resumes — walkthrough sequence complete
